build_system: pnpm workspaces + turborepo. All packages use tsc for build. Turbo caches build outputs.
test_framework: vitest (global config at vitest.config.ts, each package has its own vitest.config.ts). Tests in __tests__/ dirs.
build_command: pnpm build (runs turbo build across all packages)
test_command: pnpm test (runs turbo test across all packages)
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm typecheck - all 82 tasks must pass. 2. pnpm test - all 84 tasks must pass. 3. pnpm build - all must pass. 4. pnpm lint - all must pass.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. No Docker daemon needed for validation. Host-based tsc + vitest is primary verification.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs <=500 LOC per feature. All gates must pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint. Performance budgets are gates.
key_patterns: Class-based services with in-memory Maps (no persistence yet). Barrel exports from src/index.ts. Types in src/types.ts. Zod schemas co-located with services. Package deps use workspace:*. Tests use vitest with no external DB. Each app has backend/ with routes/, services/, __tests__/. Packages export from src/index.ts.
directory_structure: apps/ - 13 app frontends + backends (quantmail is central IdP). packages/ - 39+ shared libs. services/ - infrastructure workers. scripts/ - build/dev scripts. Root has turbo.json, vitest.config.ts, pnpm-workspace.yaml.
